name: Nanexa AB (publ)
summary: Nanexa AB (publ) operates as a nanotechnology drug delivery company. It operates PharmaShell, a nanobased drug delivery platform that is an atomic layer deposition. The company also develops NEX-18, which drives the development of a PharmaShell that targets myelodysplastic Syndrome and Acute Myeloid Leukemia. Nanexa AB (publ) was founded in 2007 and is based in Uppsala, Sweden.
